name: Greek yogurt parfait
steps: Layer the yogurt in a bowl.
Top with blueberries and granola.
Drizzle the honey over everything.

name: Oatmeal with banana & peanut butter
steps: Simmer the oats in the milk plus a splash of water.
Slice the banana over the top.
Finish with the peanut butter.

name: Veggie omelette with toast
steps: Sauté the peppers and mushrooms.
Whisk the eggs, pour over, and fold when set.
Serve with buttered toast.

name: Protein pancakes with syrup
steps: Blend oats, eggs and yogurt into a batter.
Cook as small pancakes on medium heat.
Stack and pour the syrup.

name: Cottage cheese & berry bowl
steps: Spoon the cottage cheese into a bowl.
Top with strawberries and almonds.

name: Egg-white scramble with spinach & toast
steps: Wilt the spinach in the oil.
Add the egg whites and scramble gently.
Serve on the toast.

name: Overnight oats with berries
steps: Stir everything except the berries in a jar.
Refrigerate overnight.
Top with berries before eating.

name: Breakfast burrito
steps: Scramble the eggs.
Warm the beans and the tortilla.
Fill, add cheese and salsa, and roll it up.

name: Chicken & rice bowl
steps: Cook the rice.
Season and pan-sear the chicken; steam the broccoli.
Bowl it up and finish with the oil.

name: Teriyaki salmon with rice & broccoli
steps: Cook the rice and steam the broccoli.
Sear the salmon; glaze with honey-soy in the last minute.
Plate together.

name: Beef stir-fry with rice
steps: Slice the beef thin and sear hard in the oil.
Toss in peppers and onion until crisp-tender.
Serve over the rice.

name: Turkey chili
steps: Brown the turkey with the onion.
Add tomatoes, beans and chili spices.
Simmer 20 minutes.

name: Spaghetti bolognese
steps: Brown the beef; simmer with crushed tomatoes.
Cook the spaghetti.
Toss together, finish with parmesan.

name: Grilled chicken salad plate
steps: Grill the chicken and slice.
Toss romaine with oil and parmesan.
Top with chicken and toasted bread croutons.

name: Tuna rice bowl
steps: Cook the rice and let it cool slightly.
Flake the tuna over the rice.
Top with cucumber and avocado.

name: Shrimp stir-fry noodles
steps: Sear the shrimp in the oil and set aside.
Stir-fry the pepper, add noodles.
Return shrimp, toss with soy and serve.

name: Pork tenderloin with potatoes & green beans
steps: Roast the tenderloin to 63°C and rest it.
Bake the potato; steam the beans.
Finish the beans with the butter.

name: Chicken burrito bowl
steps: Layer rice and warmed beans.
Top with sliced chicken.
Finish with salsa and avocado.

name: Beef & broccoli with rice
steps: Sear the beef in the oil.
Add broccoli and a splash of soy; steam-fry.
Serve over rice.

name: Baked cod with quinoa & asparagus
steps: Bake the cod with lemon at 200°C for 12 minutes.
Cook the quinoa; roast the asparagus in the oil.
Plate together.

name: Chicken fajita plate
steps: Sear the chicken strips; set aside.
Char the peppers and onion in the same pan.
Serve with warm tortillas.

name: Salmon rice bowl (poke-style)
steps: Cube sushi-grade salmon and marinate in soy.
Bowl over warm rice.
Top with cucumber and avocado.

name: Steak with baked potato & salad
steps: Sear the steak to your doneness and rest it.
Bake the potato; butter it.
Serve with dressed greens.

name: Lentil curry with rice
steps: Soften onion-garlic-spices in the oil.
Add tomato and lentils; simmer 15 minutes.
Serve over rice.

name: Chickpea coconut curry
steps: Bloom curry spices; add tomato.
Add chickpeas and coconut milk; simmer.
Serve over rice.

name: Tofu stir-fry with rice
steps: Press and cube the tofu; crisp it in the oil.
Add broccoli and a splash of soy.
Serve over rice.

name: Black bean tacos
steps: Warm and lightly mash the beans.
Heat the tortillas.
Fill and top with cheese, salsa, avocado.

name: Veggie burrito bowl
steps: Layer rice, beans and corn.
Top with salsa and avocado.

name: Tempeh & quinoa power bowl
steps: Slice and pan-fry the tempeh in the oil.
Massage the kale with a pinch of salt.
Bowl over quinoa.

name: Egg fried rice
steps: Scramble the eggs in the hot oil; set aside.
Fry the rice hard; add peas.
Return eggs, season with soy.

name: Turkey sandwich
steps: Layer turkey, cheese and greens between the bread.
Press lightly and slice.

name: Tuna salad sandwich
steps: Mix tuna with the mayo.
Build the sandwich with lettuce.

name: Chicken wrap
steps: Spread the hummus on the tortilla.
Add sliced chicken and greens; roll tight.

name: Peanut butter & jam sandwich
steps: Spread, close, done.

name: Grilled cheese
steps: Butter the outside of the bread.
Griddle low and slow until molten.

name: Big garden salad with chicken
steps: Chop everything.
Toss with the oil, vinegar, salt.
Top with sliced chicken.

name: Greek salad with feta & chickpeas
steps: Chop the vegetables chunky.
Add chickpeas and feta.
Dress with the oil and oregano.

name: Zucchini noodles with turkey meatballs
steps: Roll and bake the meatballs.
Simmer briefly in tomato sauce.
Serve over just-wilted zoodles.

name: Shrimp lettuce wraps
steps: Sear the shrimp in the oil with garlic.
Spoon rice and shrimp into lettuce cups.

name: Cottage cheese & fruit plate
steps: Arrange, sprinkle walnuts, eat.

name: Buttermilk-style pancakes with syrup
steps: Griddle the pancakes.
Butter and drown in syrup.

name: Bagel with cream cheese & smoked salmon
steps: Toast and split the bagel.
Spread the cream cheese; layer the salmon.

name: Pasta marinara
steps: Simmer crushed tomatoes with garlic in the oil.
Toss with the pasta.
Finish with parmesan.

name: Rice & beans
steps: Soften the onion in the oil.
Add beans and warm through.
Serve over rice.

name: Loaded baked potato
steps: Bake the potato until fluffy.
Split and load with butter, cheese, yogurt.

name: Banana oat smoothie
steps: Blend everything until smooth.

name: Berry smoothie bowl
steps: Blend the fruit with the yogurt, thick.
Top with the granola.

name: Avocado toast with eggs
steps: Toast the bread; mash the avocado onto it.
Top with fried eggs, salt, chili flakes.

name: Salmon avocado bowl
steps: Flake the cooked salmon over rice.
Add avocado and wilted spinach.

name: Eggs, bacon & avocado plate
steps: Fry the bacon; fry the eggs in a little of the fat.
Plate with the avocado.

name: Cheese & nut snack plate
steps: Slice and arrange. That's the recipe.

name: Trail-mix yogurt bowl
steps: Top the yogurt with everything crunchy.

name: Almond butter smoothie
steps: Blend until creamy.

name: Protein shake with banana
steps: Blend. Add ice if you like it cold.

name: Rice cakes with peanut butter
steps: Spread and eat before they go soft.

name: Dark chocolate & almonds
steps: Portion it out — don't eat from the bag.

name: Apple with peanut butter
steps: Slice the apple; dip.

name: Hummus & veggie plate
steps: Arrange the vegetables and pita around the hummus.

name: Cheese quesadilla
steps: Fold the cheese into the tortilla.
Toast in a dry pan until crisp; serve with salsa.

name: Shakshuka with pita
steps: Soften onion and pepper in the oil; add tomatoes and spices.
Simmer to a thick sauce, crack in the eggs.
Cover until just set; scoop with pita.

name: Greek yogurt with honey & walnuts
steps: Bowl the yogurt.
Drizzle honey, scatter walnuts.

name: Banana peanut-butter toast
steps: Toast the bread; spread the peanut butter.
Top with banana coins.

name: Egg & cheese English muffin
steps: Fry the egg; toast the muffin.
Stack with the cheese while hot.

name: Baked oats with berries
steps: Mix everything in a ramekin.
Bake at 180°C for ~22 minutes until set.

name: Cottage cheese toast with tomato
steps: Toast, spread thick, top with tomato and pepper.

name: Potato & egg breakfast hash
steps: Crisp the potatoes in the oil with the pepper.
Make wells, crack in the eggs, cover until set.

name: Scrambled eggs with smoked salmon
steps: Scramble the eggs low and slow in the butter.
Fold in the salmon off the heat; serve on toast.

name: French toast with maple syrup
steps: Whisk egg and milk; soak the bread.
Griddle in butter until golden; drown in syrup.

name: Ricotta toast with strawberries
steps: Toast, spread the ricotta.
Top with berries and a thread of honey.

name: Baked veggie egg cups
steps: Whisk eggs with the veg and cheese.
Bake in a muffin tin at 180°C for 18 minutes.

name: Granola with cold milk
steps: Pour. Crunch. Done.

name: Overnight yogurt-oat cup
steps: Stir, refrigerate overnight, top with berries.

name: Turkey & egg breakfast wrap
steps: Scramble the eggs; warm the tortilla.
Roll everything up tight.

name: Mango yogurt bowl
steps: Layer, top, eat cold.

name: Egg-baked avocado
steps: Halve the avocado, widen the pits.
Crack an egg into each, bake 15 min at 200°C.

name: Peaches & cottage cheese
steps: Slice the peach over the cottage cheese; black pepper on top.

name: Carrot-cake oatmeal
steps: Simmer oats and carrot in the milk with cinnamon.
Finish with raisins and walnuts.

name: Crispy chicken thighs with rice
steps: Roast the thighs skin-side up until crisp.
Steam the beans; serve over rice.

name: Roast turkey breast with potatoes
steps: Roast the turkey; rest it.
Butter the potatoes and beans; plate.

name: Flank steak tacos
steps: Sear the flank hard; rest, slice against the grain.
Warm the tortillas; build with onion, salsa, avocado.

name: Trout with almonds & rice
steps: Pan-fry the trout; toast the almonds in the pan.
Spoon over the fish; serve with rice and beans.

name: Halibut with quinoa & spinach
steps: Sear the halibut in the oil.
Wilt the spinach; serve over quinoa.

name: Baked haddock & potato wedges
steps: Toss wedges in oil; bake hot until crisp.
Bake the haddock the last 12 minutes; peas on the side.

name: Mackerel rice bowl
steps: Flake the mackerel over warm rice.
Top with quick-pickled cucumber and carrot.

name: Sardines on toast
steps: Toast, lay on sardines and tomato, lemon over everything.

name: Seared scallops with linguine
steps: Sear the scallops hard in half the butter.
Toss pasta with the rest, wilt in spinach, top with scallops.

name: Crab cakes with slaw
steps: Bind crab with crumbs and mayo; form cakes.
Pan-fry until golden; serve on dressed slaw.

name: Pork chop with apples
steps: Sear the chop; rest it.
Soften apple slices in the butter; serve with potatoes.

name: Ground pork & green bean stir-fry
steps: Fry the pork until crispy; blister the beans.
Season with soy and chili; serve over rice.

name: Lamb with couscous
steps: Sear the lamb to medium-rare; rest.
Grill the zucchini; fluff the couscous with the oil.

name: Skillet chicken parm
steps: Simmer crushed tomatoes; nestle in the chicken.
Top with mozzarella, lid until melted; serve over pasta.

name: Turkey meatball sub
steps: Simmer meatballs in the sauce.
Load the roll, cheese on top, broil a minute.

name: Beef & barley bowl
steps: Brown the beef with onion and mushrooms.
Stir through the barley with thyme.

name: Chicken soba noodles
steps: Toss warm soba with sesame oil and soy.
Top with sliced chicken and carrot ribbons.

name: Shrimp fried rice
steps: Scramble the egg; set aside.
Fry rice hard, add shrimp and peas, return the egg.

name: Beef & bean burrito
steps: Brown the beef; warm the beans.
Load, roll, toast seam-side down.

name: Yogurt-marinated chicken with rice
steps: Marinate chicken in spiced yogurt; grill hot.
Serve over rice with charred tomato.

name: Seared tuna with potatoes
steps: Sear the tuna 1 minute a side.
Serve pink with potatoes and beans.

name: Chicken & egg-noodle bowl
steps: Simmer carrot and peas until tender.
Add noodles and shredded chicken; season well.

name: Steak & rice bowl
steps: Sear and slice the steak.
Bowl over rice and steamed broccoli; sesame to finish.

name: Pork with rice noodles
steps: Toss warm noodles with lime, fish sauce, sugar.
Top with sliced pork and crunchy veg.

name: BBQ chicken with corn & slaw
steps: Grill the thighs, glazing at the end.
Char the corn; dress the slaw.

name: Baja-style cod tacos
steps: Flake the cooked cod into warm tortillas.
Top with cabbage, crema, salsa, lime.

name: Tilapia with tomatoes & olives
steps: Simmer tomatoes with olives and garlic.
Bake the fish in the sauce; serve over rice.

name: Turkey-stuffed peppers
steps: Mix turkey and rice; pack into halved peppers.
Bake 25 min; cheese on for the last five.

name: Beef kebab plate
steps: Skewer and grill the beef with onion.
Serve over rice with charred tomato.

name: Chicken quesadilla
steps: Fold chicken and cheese into the tortilla.
Toast both sides; serve with salsa.

name: Glazed salmon with bok-choy-style greens
steps: Brush salmon with a honey-soy glaze; roast.
Wilt the greens; serve over rice.

name: Pulled pork rice bowl
steps: Shred the pork through warm salsa.
Bowl over rice with corn.

name: Turkey & zucchini skillet
steps: Brown the turkey; add zucchini and tomato.
Simmer 8 minutes; parmesan over the top.

name: Soy-butter egg rice
steps: Fry the eggs in butter, keep yolks loose.
Slide over hot rice with soy sauce.

name: Chicken & spinach pasta
steps: Toss hot pasta with oil, parmesan, spinach.
Top with sliced chicken.

name: Tofu coconut curry
steps: Crisp the tofu; set aside.
Simmer curry base with coconut milk; return tofu; serve on rice.

name: Tempeh tacos
steps: Crumble and fry the tempeh with taco spices.
Build with salsa and avocado.

name: Chickpea fritter bowl
steps: Mash chickpeas with spices; fry as patties.
Bowl with couscous, cucumber, hummus.

name: Lentil bolognese
steps: Simmer lentils in the tomato base until thick.
Toss with the pasta.

name: White bean & kale stew
steps: Simmer beans with tomato and garlic.
Wilt in the kale; serve with bread for mopping.

name: Baked eggplant parmesan
steps: Layer roasted eggplant with sauce and cheeses.
Bake until molten and bubbling.

name: Butternut & quinoa bowl
steps: Roast the squash deep brown.
Bowl with quinoa, massaged kale, walnuts.

name: Veggie fajita bowl
steps: Char peppers and onion hard.
Bowl over rice with beans and avocado.

name: Tofu noodle stir-fry
steps: Crisp the tofu; stir-fry the broccoli.
Toss with noodles, soy, sesame.

name: Split pea soup with bread
steps: Simmer peas with carrot and onion until thick.
Blend half; serve with bread.

name: Caprese with bread
steps: Slice, layer, oil, basil if you have it.

name: Mushroom barley "risotto"
steps: Fry mushrooms deeply in the butter.
Fold through the barley with parmesan.

name: Edamame & egg rice bowl
steps: Bowl rice with warm edamame.
Top with a fried egg and sesame-soy.

name: Three-bean chili
steps: Soften the onion with chili spices.
Add beans and tomato; simmer 25 minutes.

name: Stuffed sweet potato
steps: Bake the sweet potato soft.
Split, load with beans, salsa, yogurt.

name: Tofu scramble on toast
steps: Crumble tofu into the hot oil with turmeric.
Wilt in spinach; pile on toast.

name: Shrimp & avocado plate
steps: Arrange over leaves; salsa for dipping.

name: Big egg-white scramble
steps: Sauté the veg; add whites and scramble soft.

name: Tuna cucumber boats
steps: Mix tuna with the yogurt and dill.
Spoon into halved, seeded cucumbers.

name: Chicken & vegetable bowl
steps: Simmer the veg until just tender.
Add shredded chicken; season generously.

name: Melon & ham plate
steps: Wrap melon wedges in the ham. Cracked pepper.

name: Citrus shrimp salad
steps: Toss greens with orange and avocado.
Top with shrimp; squeeze the leftover citrus over.

name: Turkey lettuce cups
steps: Fry turkey with garlic-ginger-soy.
Spoon into cups with carrot matchsticks.

name: Beet & feta plate
steps: Quarter the beets over greens.
Crumble feta, scatter walnuts, oil and vinegar.

name: Zucchini & egg skillet
steps: Brown the zucchini in the oil.
Crack in the eggs, lid until set, parmesan over.

name: Chicken with cauliflower rice
steps: Pulse cauliflower to rice; fry hot in the oil.
Fold in peas; top with sliced chicken.

name: Watermelon & feta bowl
steps: Cube, crumble, mint if you have it.

name: Brothy beans & greens
steps: Warm beans in garlicky broth; wilt the kale.
Finish with the oil and lemon.

name: Deviled eggs & veg plate
steps: Boil, halve, mash yolks with mayo and mustard.
Refill; serve with crunchy veg.

name: Grilled veg & cheese plate
steps: Grill the veg and thick cheese slices.
Stack; oil and herbs over.

name: Asparagus & soft egg toast
steps: Blanch the asparagus; soft-boil the eggs.
Pile on toast; let the yolk be the sauce.

name: Crunchy chicken slaw bowl
steps: Shred everything.
Toss with thinned mayo, vinegar, pepper.

name: BLT
steps: Crisp the bacon.
Build on mayo-slicked toast.

name: Ham & Swiss sandwich
steps: Stack on rye with mustard.

name: Egg salad sandwich
steps: Boil, chop, bind with mayo and mustard.
Pile between the bread.

name: Caprese sandwich
steps: Layer into the split baguette.
Oil, salt, basil; press lightly.

name: Roast beef sandwich
steps: Stack with horseradish if you have it.

name: Smashed chickpea wrap
steps: Smash chickpeas with mayo, lemon, celery salt.
Wrap with the lettuce.

name: Salmon salad sandwich
steps: Schmear, layer, slice.

name: Peanut butter banana wrap
steps: Spread, lay in the whole banana, drizzle, roll.

name: Turkey avocado wrap
steps: Mash the avocado onto the tortilla.
Layer turkey and greens; roll tight.

name: Chicken caesar-style wrap
steps: Toss chicken and romaine in the dressing.
Roll it up with the parmesan.

name: Open-face cottage rye
steps: Top the rye; cucumber and dill over.

name: Grilled ham & cheese
steps: Butter the outside; griddle until molten.

name: Hummus veggie wrap
steps: Spread thick; pile in the veg; roll tight.

name: Tuna melt
steps: Mix, pile, cheese on top.
Broil open-faced until bubbling.

name: Cobb salad
steps: Arrange everything in rows over the leaves.
Vinaigrette at the table.

name: Tuna niçoise-style salad
steps: Boil the egg; blanch the beans.
Compose over potatoes; olives and vinaigrette.

name: Quinoa tabbouleh
steps: Chop fine, toss with lemon and lots of parsley.

name: Wedge with blue-cheese-style dressing
steps: Quarter the head; drape with dressing.
Scatter bacon and tomato.

name: Kale caesar-style salad
steps: Massage the kale; toss with dressing.
Croutons and parmesan over.

name: Chickpea Greek bowl
steps: Chunk everything; toss with oregano and the oil.

name: Steak salad
steps: Rest the steak before slicing over the greens.
Warm juices become the dressing.

name: Shrimp avocado salad
steps: Toss with lime, salt, chili flakes.

name: Apple walnut chicken salad
steps: Cube chicken and apple; bind with the yogurt.
Walnuts folded through last.

name: Carrot raisin slaw + eggs
steps: Grate, toss, dress.
Boiled eggs on the side make it lunch.

name: Spaghetti with butter & parmesan
steps: Toss hot pasta with butter and cheese.
Pasta water makes it a sauce.

name: Couscous & roast veg bowl
steps: Roast the veg dark.
Fluff couscous; fold everything through.

name: Bulgur pilaf with chickpeas
steps: Brown the onion in the oil.
Stir through bulgur and chickpeas; lemon over.

name: Wild rice & raisin pilaf
steps: Soften the onion; fold everything through warm rice.

name: Buckwheat with mushrooms
steps: Fry mushrooms and onion in the butter.
Fold through the buckwheat.

name: Pancakes with berries
steps: Stack, berry, syrup.

name: Bagel with PB & banana
steps: Toast, spread, slice the banana over.

name: Stovetop mac & cheese
steps: Melt butter, milk, and cheese into a sauce.
Fold in the pasta; season hard.

name: Vanilla rice pudding
steps: Simmer rice in milk until creamy.
Sweeten; raisins in at the end.

name: Date & oat energy bowl
steps: Simmer oats in milk; chop dates through.
Almond butter swirled on top.

name: Creamy corn & egg bowl
steps: Blitz half the corn creamy with butter.
Fold in the rest; top with a fried egg.

name: Sweet couscous breakfast bowl
steps: Steam couscous with cinnamon.
Fold in orange and honey; almonds over.

name: Pretzels & hummus plate
steps: Arrange and dip.

name: Cherry granola parfait
steps: Layer twice; eat with a long spoon.

name: Steak & eggs
steps: Sear the steak; rest it.
Fry the eggs in the same butter.

name: Salmon cream pasta
steps: Warm cream with the flaked salmon and peas.
Toss with the pasta; lemon zest over.

name: Roasted cauliflower tahini bowl
steps: Roast cauliflower dark in the oil.
Bowl with chickpeas; thin tahini with lemon and pour.

name: Cheese & fruit board for one
steps: Slice, arrange, graze.

name: Avocado tuna bowl
steps: Mash avocado through the tuna.
Bowl over rice; sesame-soy over.

name: No-bake oat bites
steps: Mix, roll into balls, chill 20 minutes.

name: Bacon avocado toast
steps: Mash, pile, shatter the bacon over.

name: Loaded potato, the fat way
steps: Bake fluffy; split; load everything in.

name: Olive, feta & pita plate
steps: Arrange; oil and oregano over the feta.

name: Coconut rice pudding
steps: Simmer rice in coconut milk; sweeten.
Cold mango on warm pudding.

name: Cottage cheese & pineapple cup
steps: Spoon together. That is the whole recipe.

name: Boiled eggs & crackers
steps: Boil 8 minutes; salt well.

name: Apple & cheddar
steps: Slice both; alternate bites.

name: Yogurt & berry cup
steps: Stir and eat.

name: Salted edamame
steps: Steam five minutes; flaky salt; pop from the pods.

name: Parmesan popcorn
steps: Pop, toss in melted butter, dust with parmesan.

name: Banana with almond butter
steps: Slice and dip, or just spread as you go.

name: Carrots & hummus cup
steps: Cut, dip, crunch.

name: Kiwi yogurt cup
steps: Layer; honey thread on top.

name: Rice cakes with avocado
steps: Mash, spread, chili flakes.

name: Grapes & walnuts
steps: A handful of each. Done.

name: Turkey cheese roll-ups
steps: Roll cheese and cucumber inside the turkey.

name: Vanilla ice cream, honestly
steps: Scoop. Enjoy it on purpose.

name: Dark chocolate strawberries
steps: Melt, dip, set in the fridge 10 minutes.

name: Green smoothie
steps: Blend until completely smooth.

name: Berry yogurt smoothie
steps: Blend cold; drink colder.

name: Mango lassi
steps: Blend with a pinch of cardamom.

name: Chocolate PB smoothie
steps: Blend; the chocolate melts on its own.

name: Orange carrot smoothie
steps: Blend hard; strain if you mind pulp.

name: Oat & date shake
steps: Soak oats five minutes, then blend everything.

name: Watermelon cooler
steps: Blend with ice and a squeeze of lime.

name: Cherry almond smoothie
steps: Blend; tastes like dessert, counts like breakfast.

name: The big breakfast plate
steps: Bacon first; eggs in the fat.
Pancakes stacked, buttered, syruped. Commit.

name: Double chicken & rice plate
steps: Same chicken-and-rice, twice the ambition.
Steam the broccoli; oil over everything.

name: Loaded spaghetti bolognese
steps: Brown the beef hard; simmer with tomatoes.
Toss with the mountain of pasta; parmesan snow on top.

name: Fully loaded burrito
steps: Brown the beef; warm rice and beans.
Load everything, roll like you mean it, toast the seam.
